THE ROSTER 🃏

8 guys from Hopedale, MA — Class of '96. Married, kids, old balls. Tap a card to flip it. No witnesses.

      // the locals

      WILDLIFE FIELD GUIDE 🦅

      What you'll see and hear out here. Thompson runs ~4,419 acres and up to 121 ft deep — plenty of room for all of it.

      Source: lakesofmaine.org Thompson Lake page · Maine DEP & IF&W.
